creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:

> State-Changed-Why: 
> 
> The problem has been solved on the submitter's side.
> 
> If you find the cause of the failure, please don't forget to post a
> follow-up, it might be interesting to document it.
> 
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=110480

Actually there is really a problem, which could be fixed by PR
ports/112497: see

<http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=112497>.

Regards,

Th. Thomas.
